content.en:
"Failed again!"

Ye Tian's cultivation of the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang failed, and his physical body collapsed.

He didn't maintain it either, and directly disarmed the replica body.

This is already an unknown number of failures he has had!

For thousands of primeval epochs, he had exhausted all kinds of materials, and he had no success.

Now, he has no materials and has to buy them again.

"If you want to cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, it's too difficult!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But there is no way, he still has to cultivate.

After all, he was reluctant to give up the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang!

Now for him, the only thing that is difficult is to gather materials.

Although he has failed many times now, he also has more perception and understanding of the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang, as long as he continues to cultivate, there will always be a day of success.

"Gotta find a way to earn more Eternal Gold again!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he studied it carefully, but he didn't have any good ideas.

So, he asked Ma Jia to go to Junzu and talk to Junzu.

......

True Beast Alliance.

Ye Tian's vest, the lord of Dong Yuan, came to find Jun Zu.

"Apprentice, do you want to ask for advice from a teacher?" Jun Zu asked.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Master, the disciple wants to ask for advice, how can I earn more Eternal Ancient Gold in a short period of time, and I can earn it in a normal way!"

"Apprentice, you are very short of eternal gold, why can I give you some!"

Jun Zu said.

"Master, there is no shortage of disciples, I just want to ask about it so that I can prepare for the future. "

Ye Tian said.

He knew that Jun Zu would give him some Eternal Ancient Gold, but the Eternal Ancient Gold he lacked was not a small amount, and even if it was Jun Zu, he might not necessarily take out much.

So, he didn't confess.

"For the future?" Jun Zu fell into deep thought, and began to think about how he could earn a large amount of Eternal Ancient Gold in a short period of time.

Soon.

Jun Zu opened his mouth and said: "Apprentice, it is really difficult to earn a large amount of eternal ancient gold in a short period of time, even if you are a teacher, it is very difficult to do. Earn less Eternal Ancient Gold, go to various treasure lands, collect resources, and sell them, and you can do it. Otherwise, you can only be lucky and get a lot of high-grade eternal ancient gold at once, and then you will be rich!"

Eternal Gold of the Finest!

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

If he could find a large amount of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, he would indeed be rich!

The value of the finest Eternal Gold far exceeds that of the Medium Eternal Gold, and it is enough to buy a lot of materials!

"Master, where can I get a large amount of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold?" Ye Tian asked.

“......"

Jun Zu was stunned.

He was just talking casually, but he didn't really want to let himself be a disciple to obtain the best eternal gold!

At this time, Ye Tian said again: "Master, the disciple is just curious to ask. "

Jun Zu no longer concealed it, "The high-grade eternal ancient gold is very expensive, it seems that it can be exchanged for medium eternal ancient gold, but in fact it can't be exchanged, because no force will exchange it for you, do you know why?"

"I don't know. "

Ye Tian shook his head.

Jun Zu explained, "Because the use of the Superior Eternal Ancient Gold is too great, it is of great use to every Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and it is even more useful to the Nine Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors who are impacting the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor. "

"If you want to become the Origin Realm, you must comprehend the Origin Rules, and the other side level geniuses must understand the Origin Rules of the other side. However, it is very difficult to realize the Origin Rules or Origin Rules of the Other Shore, and with the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, you can build a special formation to directly observe the Origin of the Eternal Land, so as to slowly realize the Origin Rules. "

"However, to build such a formation, it would require at least a thousand pieces of high-grade eternal gold. Moreover, the formation consumes the energy of the high-grade eternal ancient gold all the time, and cannot exist forever. "

"Therefore, the top-grade Eternal Ancient Gold has been consumed, and every Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor wants to gather a thousand pieces of Top-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, but it has always been out of stock, and it will be traded to other Heavenly Ancestors!"

Hearing Jun Zu's introduction, Ye Tian knew that the preciousness of the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold was far superior to the Medium Eternal Ancient Gold, and it was not comparable to the Medium Eternal Ancient Gold at all!

Jun Zu continued: "The amount of high-grade eternal ancient gold is too small, even the teacher wants to find a large amount of high-grade eternal ancient gold, but unfortunately it is too difficult. Now, in the eastern part of the Eternal Land, there are only a few places, and there are still a lot of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, but they are all very dangerous. "

"Which places?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"The ruins on the other side, the Tai Li, the shore of the Aohai and the Hades Mansion are all four places. Among them, the three places of Taili Realm, the Shore of the Aohai and the Hades Mansion are in danger of even entering the Origin Realm, and very few Origin Realms dare to break into these three places. Junzu said.

"And what about the ruins on the other side, isn't it dangerous?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's also very dangerous, but you can't get into the Origin Realm. Jun Zu looked at Ye Tian, "You can go in, but you can't go in, enter there with your strength, and you will fall 100%." The ruins on the other side do not allow the Origin Realm to enter, but the Bone Transformation Realm can enter. But even if it is a genius of the other side of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, if he enters there, he is at risk of falling. Seven or eight times of the Bone Transformation Realm, not to mention the other side of the Heavens, unless the luck is against the sky, there is no hope to find a few pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold from it. However, a few pieces of high-grade eternal gold don't mean much!"

"Master, the disciple will not go in. But where are the other side of the Ruins, Taili, the Shore of the Aohai and the Hades Mansion? Disciple understands, and in the future, it is better to avoid these four places to prevent them from accidentally breaking into them in the future!" Ye Tian used this excuse to ask for the location of the four places.

Jun Zu didn't hide it, and he didn't think that this apprentice of his would be stupid enough to break into these places, so he told the locations of the four places one by one.

After Ye Tian found out, he didn't continue to ask, discussed it with Jun Zu, and completely changed the topic.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian prepared for a trip to the ruins on the other side.

With his strength, it is indeed dangerous to enter the ruins on the other side, and it is easy to fall and die.

However, he entered the ruins on the other side again and again, and he did not believe that he would not be able to obtain the high-grade eternal ancient gold once.

As long as he obtains the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, he will come out of the ruins on the other side and bring the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold out.

Relying on the long years, he should have the hope of obtaining a large amount of the finest Eternal Gold.

At that time, he would have enough wealth to buy materials for cultivating the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

Therefore, he must go to the treasure land of the other side.
